sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Organon: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Organon & Co. (OGN) reported a first-quarter profit of $146 million, with net income of 55 cents per share. Adjusted earnings were 71 cents per share, falling short of Wall Street's expectation of 83 cents per share. The pharmaceutical company's revenue of $1.46 billion also missed analyst forecasts of $1.47 billion.

Despite this, Lam Research reported strong quarterly results exceeding analyst expectations due to robust AI and memory demand, leading to several price target upgrades and an average "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts.

feed.title: Netflix: 2026 TIME100 Most Influential Companies
feed.summary: Netflix has been named one of the 2026 TIME100 Most Influential Companies despite walking away from an $82.7 billion deal to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery. The streaming giant experienced significant revenue growth in 2025, reaching $45.2 billion, and surpassed 325 million global subscribers. Netflix plans to continue its growth by investing in live sports, podcasts, games, and AI, exemplified by its acquisition of Ben Affleck's AI filmmaking company, InterPositive.

feed.title: IT INVESTOR DEADLINE APPROACHING: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Reminds Gartner (IT) Investors of Securities Class Action Deadline on May 18, 2026
feed.summary: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is reminding investors of Gartner (IT) about a securities class action lawsuit deadline of May 18, 2026. The firm is investigating potential claims against Gartner for allegedly making false and/or misleading statements, particularly regarding its growth rates and ability to meet consulting revenue targets. This follows a significant drop in Gartner's stock price after it reported disappointed Q4 2025 financial results and a lower-than-expected 2026 revenue forecast.

feed.title: Altria Group stock hits 52-week high at 73.64 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Altria Group's stock recently hit a new 52-week high at $73.64, currently trading at $72.20, reflecting strong performance with a 6-month price return of 25.24% and a 1-year total return of 23.41%. The company also offers an attractive dividend yield of 6.22% and is considered undervalued by InvestingPro analysts. Additionally, Altria has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.06 per share, despite recent declines in U.S. cigarette volumes reported by Barclays and Nielsen.

feed.title: APO INVESTOR DEADLINE APPROACHING: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Reminds Apollo Global Management (APO) Investors of Securities Class Action Deadline on May 1, 2026
feed.summary: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is reminding investors of Apollo Global Management (APO) about the May 1, 2026 deadline to seek lead plaintiff status in a federal securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Apollo Global Management and its executives made false or misleading statements regarding the company's past dealings with Jeffrey Epstein, negatively impacting the stock price. Investors who purchased securities between May 10, 2021, and February 21, 2026, and suffered losses are encouraged to contact the firm.

feed.title: Hershey bounces back as profits jump 93%
feed.summary: Hershey reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, with revenue up 10.6% to $3.1bn and profits surging 93.6% to $435.1m, indicating a significant rebound after a turbulent start to the year. The company attributed this growth to eased inflation and cost pressures, with Hershey’s and Reese’s brands driving double-digit non-seasonal sales. Despite a struggling international business, Hershey reaffirmed its 2026 guidance, focusing on core growth and strategic investments.

feed.title: Edison International (NYSE:EIX) Sees Significant Growth in Short Interest

Insider selling and institutional investor activity are also highlighted.

feed.title: L3Harris Stock Falls After Earnings Beat and Guidance Increase
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies reported strong first-quarter results that beat earnings estimates, yet its stock fell. Despite the company's positive performance and an increase in guidance, the market reaction reflects the challenges defense contractors currently face.

feed.title: (ITW) Illinois Tool Works Expects 2026 EPS Range $11.10 to $11.50, vs. FactSet Est of $11.23

feed.title: Amazon, Google, and Microsoft are seeing unprecedented gains in cloud, thanks to AI (AMZN:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Amazon, Google, and Microsoft are experiencing substantial growth in their cloud services, largely due to significant investments in artificial intelligence. Their recent quarterly results indicate that increased AI-driven capital expenditures are boosting cloud provider revenues across the board. AI is now Google Cloud's primary growth driver, while AWS has significantly closed the AI gap with its competitors.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Becton Dickinson (BDX) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
feed.summary: Becton Dickinson (BDX) has seen recent share price weakness, with a 6.6% decline over the last 7 days and an 8.6% drop over the past year. Simply Wall St's valuation model suggests the stock is currently undervalued, with a Discounted Cash Flow analysis indicating it could be 31.6% undervalued and a Price vs Earnings comparison also pointing to a discount. The article encourages investors to consider these valuation models in light of the stock's recent performance.

feed.title: Boeing: 2026 TIME100 Most Influential Companies
feed.summary: Boeing returned to profitability in 2025, outperforming Airbus in orders after seven years. The company implemented a major operational overhaul, including new leadership and stricter manufacturing and safety protocols, which led the FAA to raise production caps. With a backlog of over 5,900 aircraft, Boeing is on a path to recovery.

feed.title: Spring Into Gaming: HyperX Expands Its Gaming Peripherals and Software Ecosystem
feed.summary: HP Inc. announced new additions to its HyperX gaming portfolio, including the HyperX Clutch Talon Controller, HyperX Cloud Stinger 3 headset family, and enhanced HyperX NGENUITY software. These new products are designed to offer gamers greater control, personalization, and comfort, with features like Hall Effect sticks, interchangeable parts, immersive audio, and advanced audio customization. The aim is to empower players to fine-tune their setups and enhance their competitive performance across various platforms.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips cuts Q1 2026 production outlook, beats earnings
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips has reduced its production outlook for the first quarter of 2026. Despite this revision, the company announced that it has exceeded its earnings expectations.

feed.title: Ford Appoints Maria Ricciardone Chief Investor Relations Officer
feed.summary: Ford Motor Company has appointed Maria Ricciardone as its new chief investor relations officer, effective May 1. Ricciardone, who previously served as vice president, treasurer, and investor relations at Lockheed Martin, brings extensive experience in capital markets, financial strategy, and investor engagement. She succeeds Lynn Antipas Tyson, who will transition to a senior advisory role, and will lead Ford's global investor relations strategy, focusing on transparent communication of the Ford+ plan to shareholders and analysts.

feed.title: Fortinet Unveils 2026 Global Threat Landscape Report Highlighting Rising Cybercrime Trends and AI-Enhanced Attacks
feed.summary: Fortinet (NASDAQ: FTNT) has released its 2026 Global Threat Landscape Report, detailing an increase in cybercrime, the rising use of AI by attackers, and a significant surge in ransomware incidents. The report, based on data from FortiGuard Labs, emphasizes that cyberattacks are now interconnected systems, with AI accelerating the sophistication and speed of malicious operations. Fortinet is actively combating these trends through global collaborations and by encouraging organizations to adopt AI-enabled cybersecurity tools.

feed.title: Costco Wholesale: 2026 TIME100 Most Influential Companies
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale has been recognized as one of the 2026 TIME100 Most Influential Companies for its steadfast commitment to social responsibility, even as other corporations scaled back. The company notably reaffirmed its conviction in diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) despite political pressure and has expanded its community contributions through significant donations, new supply-chain commitments, and a partnership to offer affordable fertility care to its members. These actions highlight Costco's dedication to accessible, affordable solutions and social values.

feed.title: Do Record Q1 Earnings And New Buyback Shift The Bull Case For Northwest Bancshares (NWBI)?
feed.summary: Northwest Bancshares (NWBI) reported record Q1 2026 earnings, including higher net interest income of US$142.48 million and net income of US$50.54 million, and declared a US$0.20 per-share quarterly dividend. The company also announced a new US$50 million share repurchase program, reinforcing its commitment to capital returns. While these developments support its income-focused regional banking narrative, investors should also consider ongoing risks like credit quality in certain markets and branch network costs.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Teledyne Technologies (TDY) After Its Recent Share Price Volatility
feed.summary: Teledyne Technologies (TDY) has experienced recent stock volatility but has delivered solid multi-year returns. Simply Wall St's valuation checks currently rate the stock 1 out of 6, indicating it may be overvalued. While a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is fairly valued, its Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio of 31.31x, compared to a Fair Ratio of 22.18x, suggests it is overvalued by this metric.

feed.title: Airbus’ Growing Inventory: Why the 2026 Delivery Target is at Risk Despite Growing Production
feed.summary: Airbus is significantly behind its historical delivery pace for its 2026 target of 870 aircraft, primarily due to a growing disconnect between production and final delivery, rather than production issues themselves. The company has only converted 70.4% of produced aircraft into deliveries, with the A320neo family performing particularly poorly. This substantial gap, compared to Boeing's 93.2% conversion rate, indicates a critical bottleneck that, if not addressed quickly by accelerating deliveries, will make Airbus's 2026 target unfeasible and push scheduled deliveries into the following year.

feed.title: Bunge shows strong operational execution
feed.summary: Bunge Global SA exceeded its operating result expectations in the first quarter of fiscal 2026, with adjusted net earnings of $359 million, or $1.83 per share, significantly topping Wall Street estimates. Despite a 66% drop in net income, the company saw substantial increases in adjusted total segment EBIT and overall net sales. Bunge raised its fiscal 2026 adjusted EPS forecast from $7.50-$8 to $9-$9.50, attributing strong performance to its soybean and softseed processing and refining units.

feed.title: May 14: Newton Golf to release Q1 results before afternoon call
feed.summary: Newton Golf Company, Inc. (NASDAQ: NWTG) will host a conference call on Thursday, May 14, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern time to discuss its first-quarter 2026 financial results. The results will be released via press release before the call. Management will lead the presentation, followed by a Q&A session.
